## Problem / motivation

What problem does this solve? Who is affected and how often?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you've thought about and why you prefer this one.

## Additional context

Links, mockups, or related issues.
